REMARK: 05/07/2026 EX PARTE MOTION TO HAVE DEFENDANT PROCEED UNDER PSEUDONYM AND REDACTING DEFENDANTS NAME IN PRECEDING FILINGS, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES ON TIME. THE MOVING PAPERS WERE RECEIVED AT AROUND 10:30 A.M., WHICH IS PAST THE COURT'S 9:00 A.M. DEADLINE. PER TO THE COURT'S WEBSITE, COURTESY COPIES MUST BE DELIVERED NO LATER THAN 9:00 A.M.
